use_cases: Expanding FAQ sections with smooth animated reveals
Organizing service or feature descriptions in collapsible panels
Creating numbered content sections with hover feedback
Building interactive help documentation with expand/collapse behavior
ai_summary: An animated accordion component featuring smooth framer-motion transitions, numbered indicators, and click-to-expand functionality. Supports hover states with visual feedback and maintains keyboard accessibility. Designed as a flexible disclosure pattern for organizing hierarchical content on desktop and mobile platforms.
